---
title: "Projects"
---

## Displacement Measurements of Dispensing Needle

This public repository contains raw displacement measurements during a dispensing needle drop.

- Repository: <https://github.com/ZhouYuFZU/Displacement-measurements-of-dispensing-needle>
- Status: public dataset / research material
- Keywords: displacement measurement, dispensing needle, experimental data

## Additional Research Projects

Add your ongoing or completed research projects here. For each project, consider including:

- Research question
- Method or experimental setup
- Data or code link
- Main result or expected contribution
